data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for tracking bookings by source.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of tracking bookings by source (Instagram vs Facebook vs website). However, the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations regarding the implementation of this tracking feature. The linked use case mentions the need for this functionality, but without direct evidence supporting its existence or operation, the validation remains inconclusive.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of tracking bookings by source.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for tracking bookings by source
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the tracking of bookings by source.
